testsuite.name: io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.LocalEffects.FoliaDispatchTest

testcase.name: FireworkEffect.run routes spawn through the region dispatcher (Folia path)
FireworkEffect dispatcher receives the entity location when target is an Entity
PotionEffect falls back to legacy path when dispatcher returns false
PotionEffect routes addPotionEffect through the entity dispatcher (Folia path)
